subject: fix(ux): read-only transaction view + bridge actuals-forecast gap
body:
Transaction modal now opens in read-only mode showing details at a glance.
Users click "Edit" to switch to the editable form. This matches the common
case where users want to review, not modify. The chart gap between the
actuals and forecast lines is fixed by prepending the last actual data point
to the forecast series so the lines connect visually.

Tags: ux, graph, transaction, modal
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: dashboard-polish
Semver: minor
